weight_distribution.note: Authoritative distribution per Annex A: 42 five-point (23 Basic + 19 Derived), 14 three-point (7 Basic + 7 Derived), 51 one-point (residual rule), 2 dual-value (3.5.3 MFA, 3.13.11 FIPS — carried at their max=5 value in the five_point_controls count above), 1 NA (3.12.4 SSP). 42+14+51+2+1 = 110.
